content: Commander Lilith & the Fight for Sanctuary
name: Easy Mode
description: An Effervescent Maliwan shield built around Digistruct Peak synergy. On its own it is not especially remarkable, but it becomes much more powerful when paired with the other Peak-themed gear.
notes: With Salvador, Gunzerking while Peak Opener is held in the left hand can cause the damage bonus to apply to the weapon in the right hand as well.

special.description: On Digistruct Peak, it gains extra effects when used with Hard Carry or Peak Opener, including a large health boost, a much longer Fight For Your Life timer, and bonus Peak Opener damage. It also has a quirky nova interaction with the Law pistol, though the damage is minimal.
special.title: Keep the pressure up without getting bodied.

abilities: While Peak Opener is in your hands its damage in the Raid on Digistruct Peak is increased.
